equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: the audited Alloy dependency has passkey transaction type 0x77 and passkey RLP support, but no TransactionSignature compact encoding with ECDSA marker 0xEC and passkey marker/length framing.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Compact TransactionSignature encoding does not distinguish ECDSA and passkey signatures with the required 0xEC and 0x77 markers plus passkey RLP length framing.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-reth-internal-v2.2.0-port has no crates/ethereum/primitives/src/transaction.rs path and no TransactionSignature compact marker implementation.
ritual-alloy-internal encodes Passkey transactions as envelope type 0x77 and provides RLP passkey helpers.
Search found no 0xEC marker or compact ECDSA/passkey signature framing with a two-byte big-endian RLP length.

notes: The present 0x77 transaction envelope type is related but not the compact signature-storage encoding required by the invariant.
rationale: The commit introduces explicit type-byte markers to distinguish ECDSA and Passkey signatures while preserving a compact storage representation. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: TransactionSignature compact encoding must prefix ECDSA signatures with type byte 0xEC followed by the standard ECDSA compact signature, and prefix Passkey signatures with type byte 0x77 followed by a two-byte big-endian RLP length and the RLP-encoded PasskeySignature bytes.
suggested_falsification_tests: Compact-encode an ECDSA TransactionSignature and assert the first byte is 0xEC and the remaining bytes decode as the original ECDSA signature; compact-encode a Passkey signature and assert the first byte is 0x77, the next two bytes equal the RLP payload length, and the payload RLP-decodes to the original passkey signature.
summary: Compact signature type markers are not implemented in the audited repos.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Compact-encode ECDSA and passkey signatures and assert first bytes 0xEC/0x77 with passkey length framing; no such compact encoder is present locally.
title: Compact signatures include ECDSA and passkey type markers
